title: erythroxylum compressum
intro: Erythroxylum compressum, also known as the guayusa tree, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest. The leaves of the guayusa tree have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including their ability to reduce inflammation and act as a natural stimulant due to their caffeine content. The health benefits of guayusa include improved mental clarity, increased energy, and enhanced antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Guayusa can be prepared as a herbal tea, traditionally brewed by indigenous communities in the Amazon region, or as a supplement in capsule or powder form.
